problem id: b5b9c138
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  01011101 -> 10111010
  01000111 -> 10001110
  10100101 -> 01001011
  00010110 -> 00101100
  00100110 -> 01001100
  11100111 -> 11001111
  11111100 -> 11111001
  10101010 -> 01010101
  00100111 -> 01001110
  11101110 -> 11011101

query: 10010000
predicted answer: 00100001
